value.rationale: The check_spending_cap tool returned ok:false — the order total of $189.00 exceeds the family's $75 monthly autonomous spending cap. This is a clear policy violation (spending cap exceeded), and there is no user override set. Per rejection criteria, this must be rejected.
value.remediation: Reduce the order to fit within the $75 monthly autonomous cap (e.g., a smaller quantity), or escalate to the parent for explicit per-action approval of the $189.00 order. Once a user override or approval is granted, the order can be re-submitted for review.
